tools.name: incident_report
tools.description: Generate ITS 2024/1772 incident report for BaFin (initial/intermediate/final). Art. 19-20. Deadlines: 4h/72h/30d.

tools.name: incident_status
tools.description: Track all incident reports per entity with deadlines and overdue status.

tools.name: roi_export
tools.description: Generate Register of Information ITS export (Art. 28(3)). Pulls providers from AmpelOracle, checks ITS mandatory fields.

tools.name: roi_validate
tools.description: Validate Register of Information against ITS mandatory fields per provider.

tools.name: tlpt_report
tools.description: Generate TLPT results summary for NCA submission (Art. 26(8)). Pulls from TestOracle.

tools.name: annual_report
tools.description: Annual ICT risk management report for board + NCA (Art. 6(5)). Auto-fills from AmpelOracle.

tools.name: management_letter
tools.description: Generate management response letter to findings. 4-eyes principle.

tools.name: nca_submission_status
tools.description: Track all NCA submissions with deadlines, status, overdue alerts.

tools.name: deadline_tracker
tools.description: All DORA reporting deadlines per entity with days-until countdown.

tools.name: report_templates
tools.description: Available ITS/RTS report templates with mandatory fields count.

tools.name: obligation_map
tools.description: Reporting obligations DORA-RPT-01 to RPT-08 with deadlines and cross-jurisdiction.

tools.name: sync_from_ampel
tools.description: Pull latest entity data from AmpelOracle for report population.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Get full report content by report_id.

tools.name: approve_report
tools.description: Approve a draft report (4-eyes). Status: draft → approved.
